channel.title: Front-End on yexca'Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Front-End on yexca'Blog

item.title: Glassmorphism
item.description: This article was partially machine translated Introduction Today, I want to summarize the things I recently designed, such as semi-transparent elements, frosted glass effects and rounded corners. But then It occurred to me that I created a webpage on December 1, 2023, so I decided to rebuild it by the way. webpage background A modern (anime style) website needs a background image. 1 2 3 4 5 6 7 8 body{ background-image: url('../img/77194247_p0.jpg'); background-size: cover; …
